title: Auto-distill fallback and kage resume continuity (verified v2.2.1)
summary: Stop hook runs kage distill auto: drafts to pending inbox tagged auto distill, excluded from recall until kage review; signal gated by observationSignalScore = 0.4 junk payloads score 0 . kage resume opens sessions with
body: Stop hook runs kage distill --auto: drafts to pending inbox tagged auto-distill, excluded from recall until kage review; signal-gated by observationSignalScore >= 0.4 (junk payloads score 0). kage resume opens sessions with the previously digest + Recent memory timeline (newest 15, ~800 token cap). SessionStart hook appends resume output to injected policy. Unchanged by the 2.2.1 sync fixes.
